en: First major forecast for 2026 Atlantic hurricane season is released. Colorado State University has released its annual Atlantic hurricane forecast, predicting 13 named storms and six hurricanes may develop during the 2026 season.
la: Prima maior praesagio pro 2026 tempore Atlantici turbinis liberatus est. Universitas publica Colorado annuum typhonicae Atlanticum praenuntiationem dimisit, 13 nominata tempestates praedicens et sex procellae tempore 2026 augeri possunt.

title: Donald Trump’s Incompetence Is Costing Him the Country
description: An unpopular war, skyrocketing gas prices, unsteady financial markets, a cabinet filled with sycophants — the president’s colossal missteps have led to calamity at home and abroad
content: It was the first week of September in 2005, about a week after Hurricane Katrina leveled New Orleans, when George W. Bush uttered the line that would come to define his second term, if not his entire… [+8768 chars]
de: Donald Trumps Inkompetenz kostet ihn das Land. Ein unpopulärer Krieg, explodierende Benzinpreise, instabile Finanzmärkte, ein Kabinett voller Speichellecker – die kolossalen Fehltritte des Präsidenten haben zu Unglück im In- und Ausland geführt
en: Donald Trump’s Incompetence Is Costing Him the Country. An unpopular war, skyrocketing gas prices, unsteady financial markets, a cabinet filled with sycophants — the president’s colossal missteps have led to calamity at home and abroad
la: Donald Trump's incompetentia est illi patriam Costing. Invidiosum bellum, gasorum skyrocketing prices, oeconomicum instabile mercatus, scrinium sycophantarum refertum - praesidis perampla missteps domi forisque ad calamitatem duxerunt.

title: WATCH: ‘GMA’ reveals name of baby African Penguin chick at New York Aquarium
description: The critically endangered penguin was given the name Walter and named after Hand Walter, a New York Aquarium curator and field scientist who worked to protect animals and staff during Hurricane Sandy.
content:

  • Iran responds to Trumps ultimatum, dismisses peace plan
  • Countdown to Artemis II lunar flyby
  • M… [+4221 chars]
de: ANSEHEN: „GMA“ verrät den Namen des afrikanischen Pinguinkükens im New York Aquarium. Der vom Aussterben bedrohte Pinguin erhielt den Namen Walter und wurde nach Hand Walter benannt, einem Kurator und Feldwissenschaftler im New York Aquarium, der sich während des Hurrikans Sandy für den Schutz von Tieren und Personal einsetzte.
en: WATCH: ‘GMA’ reveals name of baby African Penguin chick at New York Aquarium. The critically endangered penguin was given the name Walter and named after Hand Walter, a New York Aquarium curator and field scientist who worked to protect animals and staff during Hurricane Sandy.
la: CUSTODIA: ‘GMA’ nomen indicat infantem Africanum Penguin pulli Novi Eboraci Aquarii. Penguin critico periclitanti nomen Walterus impositum est et ab Manu Waltero, curatoris et agri Novi Eboraci Aquarii physicus, qui in Hurricane Sandy animalibus et baculo tuendis laboravit.

title: ‘Thrash’ Review: Netflix’s Wild Shark Disaster Movie Is Dumb Fun Done Right
description: Hurricanes + sharks + Tommy Wirkola = a surprisingly fun disaster movie, with real bite and actual scares.
content: How refreshing for a disaster film to really flex its R-rating, not just with blood and guts and bone-baring stumps (sharks, man), but characters not afraid to say “holy fucking shit” when the time c… [+5564 chars]
de: „Thrash“-Rezension: Der Netflix-Film „Wild Shark Disaster“ ist dummer Spaß, richtig gemacht. Hurrikane + Haie + Tommy Wirkola = ein überraschend lustiger Katastrophenfilm mit echtem Biss und echten Schrecken.
en: ‘Thrash’ Review: Netflix’s Wild Shark Disaster Movie Is Dumb Fun Done Right. Hurricanes + sharks + Tommy Wirkola = a surprisingly fun disaster movie, with real bite and actual scares.
la: 'Thrash' Review: Netflix's Wild Shark Disaster Movie Est Dumb Fun Done Right. Turbinum + squalis + Tommy Wirkola = pelliculae cladis mirae ioci, cum reali morsu et actuali terret.
